backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (UserProfile, Couple, planner entries, journal entries, VisionBoard, etc.) and initializing state maps with authorization mixin for the Future Us app backend.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features for VisionBoard.tsx: ensuring all milestones are always fully visible, and reverting the page to the version 28 layout/interaction design.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, recent changes, and key behaviors across pages, hooks, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Future Us Vite/React app, mounting the React root and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with all page routes, the navigation bar, profile setup modal, couple mode badge, and authentication controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor instance using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend data operations including user profiles, couple management, vision board, daily planner, and journal entries. Also exports a custom CoupleCreateErrorException class for typed error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm cream/amber light theme and a dark theme, plus utility component classes like card-warm and section-title.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, mounting it to the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/CoupleSettings.tsx: Page component for managing couple connections, allowing users to link with a partner via Principal ID or dissolve an existing couple, with error handling and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/DailyPlanner.tsx: Page component for a daily planner with date navigation, supporting mood tracking, tasks, schedule items, and water intake, plus a read-only view of the partner's planner entry for the selected date.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page that displays a daily inspirational quote, weekly task progress, vision board goal summaries, and navigation shortcuts to other app sections.
frontend/src/pages/JournalSection.tsx: Journal page with tabbed sections for daily, emotional, night reflection, and growth journals, supporting date navigation, entry editing, and a read-only partner journal view.
frontend/src/pages/MonthlyPlanner.tsx: React page for a monthly planner that lets users manage goals, important dates, budgets, moods, and notes for a given month, with a read-only partner view fetched via couple-aware queries.
frontend/src/pages/VisionBoard.tsx: React page displaying a vision board where users can create, edit, delete, and track progress on categorized life goals, with a read-only tab showing the partner's entries.
frontend/src/pages/WeeklyPlanner.tsx: React page for a weekly planner supporting priorities, habit tracking, and tasks for a given ISO week, with navigation controls and a read-only partner view.
frontend/src/pages/YearlyPlanner.tsx: React page for a yearly planner covering word-of-the-year, major goals, vision images, and habit tracking across months, with a read-only partner view.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (warm palette, sidebar, chart, pastel-brown), border radii, box shadows, and plugins including typography, container-queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing two fix requests: ensuring all milestone points are fully visible in VisionBoard.tsx and reverting VisionBoard.tsx to its version 28 layout and interaction patterns.
